patch.value: pm init footer + bundle calendar so cal/templates are discoverable

Dogfood 2026-05-17: brand-new agents miss `pm cal`/`pm calendar` because the package is not bundled and `pm --help` lists nothing about installing it. Suggest: (a) print a 5-line next-steps footer at the end of `pm init` listing core invocations and the single-command install for calendar/templates/guide-shell, (b) ship calendar in the default install (it is already the de-facto path for context.agenda) so `pm cal` works out of the box.

Acceptance: pm init prints the footer; calendar command works in a fresh tracker without explicit install; tests assert both.
